summary: Get a Single Resource Planning Tag
description: Gets a single Resource Planning Tag

parameters.name: company_id
parameters.description:
Unique identifier for the company. This parameter accepts both formats:
- **Recommended**: Procore company ID (integer) - Use this for new integrations
- Legacy: LaborChart UUID format (uuid string...

schema.description: Response schema for a single Tag.

group_ids.description: Array of UUIDs representing Groups this Tag is assigned to. Can be empty if `globally_accessible` is true.

globally_accessible.description: Indicates if the Tag is globally available to all current and future Groups.

abbreviation.description: A 5-character max abbreviation for the Tag.

require_expr_date.description: Indicates whether an expiration date is required when applying the Tag to a Person.

expr_days_warning.description: Number of days before expiration when the Tag enters "warning" mode. Only applicable if `require_expr_date` is true.

color.description: Hexadecimal color code for the Tag.

categories.description: Array of Tag Categories the Tag belongs to. Can be empty if not categorized.
